roa.docketEntryComment: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISSUED 3-24-22

/CAL:SIGN & SERVE CR-110 & CR-111/DAWT/X:COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY VICTIM, LAURA MCERLANE IN THE AMOUNT OF $829,54 PLUS 10% PER YEAR FROM THE DATE OF SENTENCE/X:ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION SIGNED AND FILED/X:ABSTRACTOF JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION FILED/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y :PJ44D/CTS:44/WS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X: DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO WAIVE FINES AND FESS IS GRANTED,//SUSFF/SA2: THE ADDRESS OF 654 LOMBARD STREET IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD3/X: STIPLUATION AS TO RESTITUTION ENTERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM(S) LAURA MCERLANE IN THEAMOUNT OF $829,54, AS DETERMINED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT, PLUS10%ADMINISTRATIVE FEES,/X: COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE TO PREPARE A CR-110 AND CR-111 TO BE SIGNED, FILED AND SERVED AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE,/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL ACCEPTS SERVICE OF CR-110 AND CR-111 DEFENDANT WILL NOT BE PRESENT/X: THE COURT ENTERS A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AND RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER THE FOLLOWING VICTIMS: JOSEPH VASQUEZ AND JOSH ROSENFIELD/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CCU/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, PC459, A FELONY INTHE 2ND DEGREE/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-26-22/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/VD:04-12-22 IN DEPT 9/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/BAIL:2500/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/30 CMHD ELIG RPT FROMJPS/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:04-12-22/M09/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT 04-05-22 DEPT 9/DOP/CONTD: RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSIONREFERRAL 04-12-22 DEPT 9/

/CAL: TO SET/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/LDPX: 04-18-22 (60TH)/TE: 1HR/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING 04-05-22 DEPT 9/DOP/
